name: ddownload
tagline: Manage files and folders on DDownload cloud storage
description: Retrieve account information, obtain an upload session, list and inspect files, and manage folders on a DDownload account.

auth.hint: Generate an API key from Affiliate -> Settings -> API on ddownload.com and send it as the key query parameter.

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.description: Retrieve account details including storage and traffic usage.

tools.name: get_upload_server
tools.description: Obtain an upload URL and session ID to upload a new file; a new session must be requested for every upload.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of files to return per page.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Get metadata for a specific file by its file code.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder, optionally inside a parent folder.

params.name: parent_id
params.description: ID of the parent folder to create the new folder inside.

tools.name: list_folder
tools.description: List the subfolders and files inside a folder.

params.name: fld_id
params.description: ID of the folder to list; omit for the root folder.
